502k views · 3.9k reactions | june 2026 is a sky spectacle month! 🌟⁠
this june has it all: conjunctions, a parade, meteors, a solstice, and a strawberry moon. don't just glance up – look up and enjoy the show!⁠
here are the main events to watch:⁠
⁠
☄️ jun 7 – peak of daytime arietids (30 meteors/hour, best at dawn)⁠
🤝 jun 9 – venus & jupiter super-close conjunction – two brightest planets kiss!⁠
🌌 jun 12 – mini planet parade: venus + jupiter + mercury in one line⁠
🔭 jun 15 – mercury at greatest eastern elongation – perfect evening view of the elusive planet⁠
🌙 jun 17 – lunar occultation of venus – the moon hides venus (visible even by day!)⁠
☀️ jun 21 – june solstice – official start of astronomical summer⁠
🌠 jun 22 – peak of june bootids – unpredictable but could surprise with meteors⁠
🪐 jun 25 – mercury & jupiter conjunction – another stunning planetary duo⁠
🍓 jun 29 – strawberry full moon – low, bright & beautiful⁠
⁠
